headline: Centene Corp. (NYSE:CNC) Breaks Out with High Technical and Setup Quality Scores
summary: This stock screener identifies breakout candidates by filtering for stocks with a strong uptrend (Technical Rating ≥7) and tight consolidation (Setup Quality ≥7). Centene Corp (CNC) scores an 8 and 9, showing a high-probability setup near resistance.
